allow: PowerShell(docker start ollama; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; \(Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:11434/api/tags\).models | ForEach-Object { $_.name })
PowerShell(docker exec ollama ollama pull nomic-embed-text)
PowerShell(\(Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:11434/api/tags\).models | ForEach-Object { $_.name }; docker compose up -d)

PowerShell($body = @{question='What research combines knowledge graphs with retrieval-augmented generation?'; mode='vector_graph'} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post http://localhost:8000/api/ask -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -TimeoutSec 590; "ANSWER:"; $r.answer; ""; "TOP SOURCES:"; $r.sources | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.score\)  $\($_.title\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{question='How many papers did Elena Vasquez write, and which ones?'; mode='text2cypher'} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post http://localhost:8000/api/ask -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -TimeoutSec 590; "CYPHER:"; $r.cypher; ""; "ANSWER:"; $r.answer)

PowerShell($fe = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5173 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "frontend HTTP $\($fe.StatusCode\)"; \(Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/graph\).nodes.Count; \(Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/stats\) | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/src/components/GraphView.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes transformed"; docker logs graphrag-frontend --since 2m 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(foreach \($m in @\('App.jsx','components/Chat.jsx','components/GraphView.jsx'\)\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/src/$m" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "$m -> HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" }; $g = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/graph; $paper = $g.nodes | Where-Object { $_.label -eq 'Paper' } | Select-Object -First 1; "sample paper node: $\($paper | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)")

PowerShell(foreach \($m in @\('App.jsx','components/GraphView.jsx'\)\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/src/$m" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "$m -> HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" }; $g = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/graph; $paperId = \($g.nodes | Where-Object { $_.pid -eq 'p04' }\).id; $d = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/node/$paperId"; "node details for p04: label=$\($d.label\), title=$\($d.properties.title\), connections=$\($d.connections.Count\)")
